# IP-010: Goroutine with taint — safe (constant sent via channel)
# Quarantined with vulnerable twin: cross-goroutine channel still unsupported.
lang: go
file: IP-010-safe.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import "os"

func caller() {
    ch := make(chan string)
    go func() {
        s := <-ch
        os.Open(s)
    }()
    ch <- "/safe/path"
}
